name: Hartleys School Bus Inc
recent_news: No verifiable web footprint for a school bus contractor at this Snellville, GA address; listed address (4034 Waters End Ln) is residential. The well-known 'Hartley's School Buses Inc' (hartleysschoolbusesinc.com) is headquartered in Rugby, ND with operations in ND/MT only — no GA presence. The cited domain 'hartleysschoolbuses.com' does not resolve to a confirmed Georgia operator.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm this is an active school bus contractor. Residential address and absent web presence suggest record may be stale, mislabeled, or a shell. Recommend de-prioritize pending direct outreach or Georgia SOS check.

name: Apple Bus Co
districts_or_customers: 80+ school districts across 8 states with 33 locations
recent_news: Acquired by First Student in 2022 (announced Feb 24, 2022; closed by summer 2022). At time of acquisition: ~1,500 buses, 33 locations across 8 states, 80+ district customers. ~75% pupil transport, balance NEMT and shuttle.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in candidate — already absorbed into First Student in 2022. Eliminate from pipeline. The Centerview, MO entry is a residual local terminal/location, not a standalone target.

name: Excellent Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Brooklyn-Catskills summer camp/yeshiva transport (incl. Yeshiva Zichron Moshe)
Toronto and Monroe NY scheduled routes
recent_news: Operating ~33 years as a family business; website materials and 2025 summer schedule confirm active Brooklyn-Catskills Orthodox/Hasidic community charter routes. No public M&A activity.
fit_notes: Marginal fit — niche charter/scheduled service focused on Hasidic Brooklyn-Catskills routes rather than core district school contracts. Family-run with potential succession dynamics, but customer base differs materially from Summit's K-12 contracted model.

name: Bus USA
recent_news: FL Sunbiz: BUS U.S.A. INC. filed 04/05/2002, document P02000039699; reinstated 10/15/2018; status Active. Classified as Taxi and Limousine Service. D&B estimates ~$300K annual revenue. No evidence of school district contracts in Osceola County (district runs in-house transport).
fit_notes: Weak fit — likely a small charter/limo operator misclassified as school transport. Osceola County School District runs its own transportation; no evidence Bus USA holds a district contract. De-prioritize.

name: Eschbach Bus Svc
principals: David Eschbach III (Owner, transitioning toward retirement)
Jake Menapace (President since 2014, son-in-law of David Eschbach III)
David Eschbach Sr. (founder of school-bus pivot)
recent_news: 4th-generation family business, 80+ years in operation. David Eschbach III spent ~8 years training son-in-law Jake Menapace as successor; Menapace named President in 2014 and has run day-to-day since 2010. Per 2021 LancasterOnline coverage during driver shortage: ~150 buses, ~140 drivers. ~50% of employees have 10+ year tenure.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate. Largest school bus provider in Southern Lancaster County, ~150 buses, anchor multi-year contracts with Penn Manor and Solanco, 4th-gen owner publicly transitioning to son-in-law — clear succession dynamic. PA is a Summit expansion state with consolidating market; high strategic fit on geography, scale (~$12M revenue), and contract stickiness.
